sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select --an.* 
an.ID
,an.DateLogged
,an.MemberId
,an.FunctionName
,an.[Action]
,an.[Message]
,an.JsonData
,an.AppType
,an.DateResaved
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ApplicationLog t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.AppointmentId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_AppointmentNonPropagationUpdates t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.AppointmentId
,ap.PropagatingAccountInfoId
,ap.PropagatingProviderServiceId
,ap.PropagatingStaffMemberId
,ap.PropagatingChildProfileId
,ap.PropagatingChildProfileAuthorizationId
,ap.PropagatingFunderId
,ap.PropagatingChildProfileFunderId
,ap.PropagatingProviderBillingCodeId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.StartDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_AppointmentPropagation t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.AppointmentId
,ap.RequestJson
,ap.SequenceId
,ap.UpdatedTimesCount
,ap.StateModelJson
,ap.SandataStatusUuid
,ap.IsInProcess
,ap.StartDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_AppointmentSandataInfo t2 on t1.AppointmentId = t2.AppointmentId
where t2.AppointmentId is null
select AppointmentId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
	  ,ap.[Name]
      ,ap.[StartDate]
      ,ap.[EndDate]
      ,ap.[Note]
      ,ap.[BehaviorPlanId]
      ,ap.[dateCreated]
      ,ap.[dateLastModified]
      ,ap.[dateDeleted]
      ,ap.[isDefault]
      ,ap.[manuallyEntered]
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
INNER JOIN	dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanId= bp.Id  ) 
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorAssessmentAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select   -- ba.* 
ba.id
,ba.DateCreated
,ba.DateLastModified
,ba.DateDeleted
,ba.BehaviorAssessmentLogId
,ba.AbcOptionsId
,ba.ModifiedBy
,ba.DeletedBy
,ba.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ba 
inner join dbo.BehaviorAssessmentLog ap on(ba.BehaviorAssessmentLogId=ap.id )	
inner join	dbo.BehaviorTracking bp on (ap.BehaviorTrackingid= bp.Id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ba.IsMigrated = 0

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorAssessmentLogAbcOptions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
ap.id
,ap.[Name]
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.Note
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.isDefault
,ap.manuallyEntered
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join	 dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanId= bp.Id  ) 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorAssessment t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
    ap.id
    ,ap.behaviorTrackingId
    ,ap.childProfileId
    ,ap.assessmentDate
    ,ap.startTime
    ,ap.endTime
    ,ap.notes
    ,ap.dateCreated
    ,ap.dateLastModified
    ,ap.dateDeleted
    ,ap.memberId
    ,ap.invalidData
    ,ap.errorMessage
    ,ap.recordResultInd
    ,ap.ModifiedBy
    ,ap.DeletedBy
    ,ap.CreatedBy
    from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
    inner join	dbo.BehaviorTracking bp on (ap.BehaviorTrackingid= bp.Id  ) 
    inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
    inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorAssessmentLog t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.FormResponseId
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.FunctionId
,ap.HiddenAntecedentStrategy
,ap.HiddenConsequenceStrategy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap inner join	dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanId= bp.Id  ) 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorFormPlanFunction t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select	ap.Id
		,ap.behaviorSkillsStrategyId
		,ap.behaviorPlanFunctionId
		,ap.planId
		,ap.lessonId
		,ap.behaviorNonLessonSkillsId
		,ap.CustomSkill
		,ap.Notes
		,ap.MemberId
		,ap.DateCreated
		,ap.DateLastModified
		,ap.DateDeleted
		,ap.currentCurriculumId
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlanFunction bf on (ap.Behaviorplanfunctionid=bf.id  )
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (bf.Behaviorplanid=bp.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorFunctionSkillsAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
 ap.id
,ap.behaviorSkillsStrategyId
,ap.behaviorPlanFunctionId
,ap.planId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.behaviorNonLessonSkillsId
,ap.currentCurriculumId
,ap.CustomSkill
,ap.Notes
,ap.MemberId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.LessonStrategyId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap inner join dbo.BehaviorPlanFunction bf on (ap.Behaviorplanfunctionid=bf.id  )
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (bf.Behaviorplanid=bp.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorFunctionSkills t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.note
,ap.priorityId
,ap.memberId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorNote t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select	 ap.Id
		,ap.ClientId
		,ap.CustomCategoryId
		,ap.BehaviorPlanId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanId=  bp.id )	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanCustomCategory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
 ap.id
,ap.behaviorPlanDataId
,ap.occurredFrom
,ap.occurredTo
,ap.notes
,ap.memberId
,ap.intervalOccurred
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.isCorrect
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecording bp on (ap.behaviorPlanDataId=bp.id   ) 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )			
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
     ap.id
     ,ap.planId
     ,ap.behaviorTrackingId
     ,ap.[date]
     ,ap.numberOfMinutes
     ,ap.numberOfTimesPerDay
     ,ap.numberOfHoursObserved
     ,ap.numberOfIntervalsOccured
     ,ap.numberOfIntervalsObserved
     ,ap.notes
     ,ap.memberId
     ,ap.dateCreated
     ,ap.dateLastModified
     ,ap.dateDeleted
     ,ap.recordResultInd
     ,ap.iepObjectiveId
     ,ap.observedFrom
     ,ap.observedTo
     ,ap.invalidData
     ,ap.errorMessage
     ,ap.percentCorrect
     ,ap.noCorrect
     ,ap.noInCorrect
     ,ap.hcAppointmentId
     ,ap.ModifiedBy
     ,ap.DeletedBy
     ,ap.CreatedBy
     ,ap.IsAutomastered
     ,ap.StartDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 	inner join behaviorTracking bt on (bt.Id=ap.behaviorTrackingId)
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )		
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanDataRecording t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select	ap.Id
		,ap.BehaviorPlanId
		,ap.FunctionId
		,ap.dateCreated
		,ap.dateLastModified
		,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.Behaviorplanid=bp.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanFunctionAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

ap.id
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.FunctionId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy

inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.Behaviorplanid=bp.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanFunction t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

select t1.* from (select	ap.id
		,ap.BehaviorPlanId
		,ap.StartDate
		,ap.EndDate
		,ap.dateCreated
		,ap.dateLastModified
		,ap.dateDeleted
		,ap.BehaviorPlanReviewId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanid=bp.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanHistoryAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.BehaviorPlanReviewId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanid=bp.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id )  
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select
ap.id
,ap.MemberId
,ap.TeamMemberId
,ap.ExternalMemberId
,ap.BehaviorPlanId
,ap.isImplementer
,ap.isRecorder
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
INNER JOIN dbo.BehaviorPlan bp ON ap.BehaviorPlanId = bp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON bp.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_BehaviorPlanMembersAudit t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
